message:
feat(runtime): add cancel attribution config and thread-local scheduler access

Wire CancelAttributionConfig through the runtime stack to bound memory growth
during cancellation cascades, and introduce ScopedLocalScheduler for thread-local
scheduler access from within task execution contexts.

- Add cancel_attribution field to RuntimeConfig with default values
- Add cancel_attribution_config() builder method on RuntimeBuilder
- Propagate config into RuntimeState via set_cancel_attribution_config()
- Add thread_local CURRENT_LOCAL storing Option<Arc<Mutex<PriorityScheduler>>>
- Add ScopedLocalScheduler RAII guard that saves/restores previous thread-local
  scheduler on construction/drop
- Update RuntimeState Debug impl and initialization for new field
- Add tests for default config values and explicit config propagation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
